_comment: Safelight verified-extension allowlist. Each entry is either a GitHub 'owner/repo' string (verified but NOT pinned to a version) or an object { repo, version, commit } that pins the exact reviewed point (preferred). Listed repos show a Verified badge and install without the unverified-risk prompt — but for pinned entries, once the repo publishes a version newer than 'version', that newer version is treated as unreviewed (amber badge + install prompt) until re-reviewed and bumped here. To get verified, open a pull request; a maintainer reviews the code before merging. See README.
